description: Unified manifest for the Studio Intelligence layer. This defines how Diagnostics, Health History, Snapshot exports, Predictive Diagnostics, Auto Repair, dependency mapping, coverage, and future audits should share one report model.

activeModules.label: Validation Engine
activeModules.role: Builds the main diagnostics report and repository model.

activeModules.label: Health History
activeModules.role: Stores local browser history for health, coverage, errors, warnings, and info counts.

activeModules.label: Diagnostics Snapshot System
activeModules.role: Exports repo-ready diagnostics snapshots for latest-report.json.

activeModules.label: Auto Repair Engine
activeModules.role: Converts findings into suggested repairs and future patch plans.

activeModules.label: Dependency Graph Viewer
activeModules.role: Visualizes source-aware dependencies and cross-index relationships.

activeModules.label: Coverage Heat Map
activeModules.role: Summarizes coverage pressure across indexed knowledge areas.

activeModules.label: Repository Evolution Dashboard
activeModules.role: Tracks repository maturity and diagnostic growth signals.

activeModules.label: Predictive Diagnostics
activeModules.role: Ranks next-best actions from findings, repair load, coverage pressure, and health history.

plannedAudits.label: UI Layout Audit
plannedAudits.goal: Detect overflowing elements, duplicate layout owners, wrapper conflicts, and mobile layout drift.

plannedAudits.label: Module Ownership Audit
plannedAudits.goal: Map each feature to one active owner and flag duplicate ownership before new systems are added.

plannedAudits.label: Report Timeline
plannedAudits.goal: Compare recent diagnostics snapshots to show health, coverage, error, warning, and source-count trends.

plannedAudits.label: Documentation Audit
plannedAudits.goal: Check README, PROJECT_STATE, ROADMAP, and Studio reference docs against live manifests.

plannedAudits.label: Runtime Audit
plannedAudits.goal: Compare live page script loading against the runtime manifest and diagnostics source registry.

developmentRules: All Studio Intelligence modules should read from the shared diagnostics report when possible.
Do not duplicate report-building logic in every dashboard panel.
Keep latest-report.json as a repo-tracked snapshot target, not a browser-write endpoint.
Keep GitHub write credentials out of static GitHub Pages code.
Favor small audit modules that explain ownership before modifying gameplay.
nextSteps: Register this manifest in diagnostics sources.
Add UI Layout Audit as the first new intelligence audit.
Add Module Ownership Audit after layout audit proves useful.
Document the Studio Intelligence layer in PROJECT_STATE and studio-reference.
